interfaces.name: ItemCategory
interfaces.signature: enum ItemCategory: String, Codable, CaseIterable { case watch, vinyl, card, wine, sneaker, other }
interfaces.notes: Fixed six-category enum shared across capture, detail, export, and classification mapping.

interfaces.name: ItemStatus
interfaces.signature: enum ItemStatus: String, Codable, Sendable { case draft, incomplete, complete }
interfaces.notes: Persisted creation/completion state; separate from computed ItemDisplayState.

interfaces.name: ConditionGrade
interfaces.signature: enum ConditionGrade: String, Codable, CaseIterable, Comparable, Sendable { case poor, fair, good, veryGood, excellent, mint }
interfaces.notes: Ordered enum (not free text) so condition-change comparisons over time are meaningful.

interfaces.name: ValueType
interfaces.signature: enum ValueType: String, Codable, CaseIterable, Sendable { case purchasePrice, appraisal, dealerOffer, marketObservation, insuredValue }
interfaces.notes: Hard constrained enum; ledger/chart rendering must visually distinguish each case, never one undifferentiated line.

interfaces.name: PhotoAssetRef
interfaces.signature: struct PhotoAssetRef: Codable, Hashable, Sendable { let originalRelativePath: String; let thumbnailRelativePath: String?; let pixelWidth: Int; let pixelHeight: Int }
interfaces.notes: Settled over a bare String path -- stored dimensions let export decide downsample-vs-embed without re-decoding. All photo fields use this type.

interfaces.name: PurchaseFacts
interfaces.signature: struct PurchaseFacts: Codable, Hashable, Sendable { var purchaseDate: Date?; var purchaseAmount: Decimal?; var source: String?; var locationNote: String? }
interfaces.notes: Decimal, not minor-unit Int, for every monetary value app-wide -- no parallel cents-convention to remember at each call site.

interfaces.name: Item
interfaces.signature: @Model final class Item { @Attribute(.unique) var id: UUID; var title: String; var category: Category; var subtype: String; var status: ItemStatus; var createdAt: Date; var creationSequence: Int64; var deletedAt: Date?; var coverPhoto: PhotoAssetRef?; var conditionGrade: ConditionGrade?; var purchaseFacts: PurchaseFacts?; @Relationship(deleteRule: .cascade) var conditionEntries: [ConditionEntry]; @Relationship(deleteRule: .cascade) var valueEntries: [ValueEntry] }
interfaces.notes: creationSequence is the mandatory stable tiebreak for active-25 partition; never sort on createdAt alone.

interfaces.name: ConditionEntry
interfaces.signature: @Model final class ConditionEntry { @Attribute(.unique) var id: UUID; var itemID: UUID; var entryDate: Date; var note: String; var provenanceNote: String?; var conditionChange: ConditionGrade?; var photo: PhotoAssetRef? }
interfaces.notes: One photo max per entry, per locked scope.

interfaces.name: ValueEntry
interfaces.signature: @Model final class ValueEntry { @Attribute(.unique) var id: UUID; var itemID: UUID; var entryDate: Date; var amount: Decimal; var valueType: ValueType; var sourceNote: String?; var photo: PhotoAssetRef? }
interfaces.notes: Decimal amount, never Double, to avoid float drift in a financial ledger.

interfaces.name: AppSettings
interfaces.signature: @Model final class AppSettings { @Attribute(.unique) var id: Int; var installCurrencyCode: String; var appLockEnabled: Bool; var recentlyDeletedRetentionDays: Int; var installedAt: Date }
interfaces.notes: Singleton row (id fixed at 1); currencyCode stamped once at install from Locale.current, never re-derived.

interfaces.name: EntitlementSnapshot
interfaces.signature: struct EntitlementSnapshot: Codable, Equatable { var isProActive: Bool; var lastVerifiedAt: Date? }
interfaces.notes: Cached last-known capability state for offline continuity.

interfaces.name: ItemDisplayState
interfaces.signature: enum ItemDisplayState: Equatable, Sendable { case normal; case incomplete(reason: String); case locked; case deleted(purgeDate: Date) }
interfaces.notes: Associated-value shape so badges/VoiceOver strings build directly from the enum with no second lookup. Precedence: deleted > locked > incomplete > normal.

interfaces.name: CollectionSummary
interfaces.signature: struct CollectionSummary: Equatable, Sendable { let activeItemCount: Int; let lockedItemCount: Int; let totalCollectionValue: Decimal?; let currencyCode: String; let lastComputedAt: Date }
interfaces.notes: Single source of truth for widget and any in-app aggregate value display; never computed twice independently.

interfaces.name: ClassificationSuggestion
interfaces.signature: struct ClassificationSuggestion: Sendable, Equatable { let category: Category; let confidence: Double; let sourceLabel: String }
interfaces.notes: sourceLabel retained for auditing the Vision-label-to-Category mapping table; nil/absent entirely below the confidence floor.

interfaces.name: ExportMode
interfaces.signature: enum ExportMode: Sendable { case singleItem(UUID); case collection }
interfaces.notes: Declared once here, imported everywhere -- no per-lane redeclaration.

interfaces.name: ExportPagePreview
interfaces.signature: struct ExportPagePreview: Equatable, Sendable { let pageIndex: Int; let totalPages: Int; let imageFileURL: URL }
interfaces.notes: Carries page-position metadata directly so 'Page 2 of 5' VoiceOver announcement is explicit and testable, not inferred from a bare image array.

interfaces.name: ItemRepository
interfaces.signature: protocol ItemRepository: Sendable { func createDraft(coverPhoto: PhotoAssetRef?) async throws -> Item; func updateQuickLog(itemID: UUID, title: String, category: Category, subtype: String) async throws -> Item; func markItemIncomplete(itemID: UUID, reason: String) async throws; func loadActiveAndLocked(subscriptionActive: Bool) async throws -> (active: [Item], locked: [Item]); func loadItemDetail(itemID: UUID) async throws -> Item; func savePurchaseFacts(itemID: UUID, facts: PurchaseFacts?) async throws; func addConditionEntry(_ entry: ConditionEntry) async throws; func addValueEntry(_ entry: ValueEntry) async throws; func softDelete(_ itemID: UUID, deletedAt: Date) async throws; func restore(_ itemID: UUID) async throws; func purgeExpiredDeletedItems(now: Date) async throws; func loadRecentlyDeletedItems(now: Date) async throws -> [Item]; func collectionSummary(subscriptionActive: Bool) async throws -> CollectionSummary }
interfaces.notes: Canonical persistence boundary, one method set. loadActiveAndLocked MUST delegate to partitionActiveAndLocked rather than reimplement the split -- closes the two-independently-written-truths risk.

interfaces.name: PhotoStorageService
interfaces.signature: protocol PhotoStorageService { func persistOriginalAndThumbnail(imageData: Data, itemID: UUID) async throws -> PhotoAssetRef; func persistEntryPhoto(imageData: Data, itemID: UUID, entryID: UUID) async throws -> PhotoAssetRef; func removeAssets(forItemID itemID: UUID) async throws; func removeAssets(forEntryID entryID: UUID, itemID: UUID) async throws; func makePreviewImage(for asset: PhotoAssetRef) async throws -> Data }
interfaces.notes: Handles App Group file layout, thumbnail generation, and cleanup.

interfaces.name: ClassificationService
interfaces.signature: protocol ClassificationService: Sendable { func classify(imageData: Data) async -> ClassificationSuggestion? }
interfaces.notes: VNClassifyImageRequest-backed impl maps Vision labels to Category via a reviewed lookup-table artifact, not an inline switch.

interfaces.name: EntitlementProvider
interfaces.signature: protocol EntitlementProvider: Sendable { var current: EntitlementState { get async }; func purchase(_ product: Product) async throws; func restorePurchases() async throws; func startTransactionListener() async }
interfaces.notes: Gates from Transaction.currentEntitlements (local cache), never a live network call. Listener started once at app launch.

interfaces.name: AppLockService
interfaces.signature: protocol AppLockService: Sendable { func deviceAuthenticationAvailable() -> Bool; func authenticate() async -> Bool }
interfaces.notes: If device authentication is unavailable, access is allowed rather than trapping the user.

interfaces.name: ExportService
interfaces.signature: protocol ExportService: Sendable { func buildDocumentModel(mode: ExportMode) async throws -> ExportDocumentModel; func renderPDF(_ document: ExportDocumentModel) async throws -> URL; func generatePreviewPages(for pdfURL: URL) async throws -> [ExportPagePreview]; func cleanupTemporaryExportFiles() async }
interfaces.notes: Real file rendered via UIGraphicsPDFRenderer off-main; preview generated separately from the file, never via PDFView. buildDocumentModel is the one mapping seam.

interfaces.name: computeDisplayState
interfaces.signature: func computeDisplayState(item: Item, subscriptionActive: Bool, activeItemIDs: Set<UUID>) -> ItemDisplayState
interfaces.notes: Pure function. Exhaustively unit tested (Swift Testing @Test(arguments:)) including tied creationSequence, restore-at-cap, delete-while-locked.

interfaces.name: partitionActiveAndLocked
interfaces.signature: func partitionActiveAndLocked(items: [Item], freeCapActive: Bool, capSize: Int) -> (active: [Item], locked: [Item])
interfaces.notes: O(n) single pass: filter non-deleted, sort by creationSequence, split at capSize. This is the ONLY place the active/locked split is computed -- ItemRepository.loadActiveAndLocked must delegate here, never reimplement it as an independent query.

interfaces.name: CaptureWorkflowState
interfaces.signature: enum CaptureWorkflowState: Equatable { case idle; case draftCreated(Item); case mediaProcessing(Item); case suggestionReady(Item, ClassificationSuggestion?); case saveReady(Item, ClassificationSuggestion?); case failedIncomplete(Item) }
interfaces.notes: Single feature-model state machine for capture and quick log.

interfaces.name: CatalogRoute
interfaces.signature: enum CatalogRoute: Hashable, Sendable { case itemDetail(UUID); case preservedList; case recentlyDeleted; case exportPreview(ExportMode); case settings }
interfaces.notes: Typed NavigationStack path; pushes only, never used for sheet-presented focused tasks.

interfaces.name: Category
interfaces.signature: enum Category: String, Codable, CaseIterable, Sendable { case watch, vinyl, card, wine, sneaker, other }
interfaces.notes: Fixed six-case enum, shared schema, free-text subtype carries specificity.

interfaces.name: effectiveState
interfaces.signature: func effectiveState(for item: Item, subscriptionActive: Bool, activeItemIDs: Set<UUID>) -> ItemDisplayState
interfaces.notes: Pure function, precedence: deleted > locked > incomplete > normal. Must be exhaustively unit tested including tied creationSequence values.

interfaces.name: activeLockedPartition
interfaces.signature: func activeLockedPartition(items: [Item], freeCapActive: Bool, capSize: Int) -> (active: [Item], locked: [Item])
interfaces.notes: O(n) single-pass: filter non-deleted, sort by creationSequence, split at capSize when freeCapActive. Never O(n^2) per-item recomputation.

interfaces.name: EntitlementState
interfaces.signature: enum EntitlementState: Sendable, Equatable, Codable { case free; case subscribed(expiresAt: Date?); case unknownOffline(lastVerified: CachedEntitlement?) }
interfaces.notes: Offline continuity must never silently collapse to free by omission; unknownOffline carries the flat cached snapshot, not another EntitlementState.

interfaces.name: PhotoStore
interfaces.signature: protocol PhotoStore: Sendable { func persistOriginalAndThumbnail(imageData: Data, itemID: UUID) async throws -> PhotoAssetRef; func persistEntryPhoto(imageData: Data, itemID: UUID, entryID: UUID) async throws -> PhotoAssetRef; func removeAssets(forItemID itemID: UUID) async throws; func removeAssets(forEntryID entryID: UUID, itemID: UUID) async throws; func loadImage(_ ref: PhotoAssetRef, preview: Bool) async throws -> Data }
interfaces.notes: All paths relative to App Group container root; thumbnails generated off-main via byPreparingThumbnail. Returns PhotoAssetRef, never a bare path string.

interfaces.name: PDFExportService
interfaces.signature: protocol PDFExportService: Sendable { func renderSingleItem(_ itemID: UUID) async throws -> URL; func renderCollection() async throws -> URL; func rasterizedPreviewPages(for fileURL: URL) async throws -> [CGImage] }
interfaces.notes: UIGraphicsPDFRenderer off-main for the real file; rasterizedPreviewPages feeds the native SwiftUI paged preview, never embed PDFView.

interfaces.name: CaptureState
interfaces.signature: enum CaptureState: Sendable { case capturing; case draftCreated(itemID: UUID); case mediaProcessing(itemID: UUID); case awaitingDetails(itemID: UUID, coverPhoto: PhotoAssetRef, suggestion: ClassificationSuggestion?); case saveReady(itemID: UUID); case incomplete(itemID: UUID, reason: String) }
interfaces.notes: Single canonical name/shape. Owned exclusively by CaptureViewModel; Vision result only persists to Item.category if still selected at Save.

interfaces.name: CaptureViewModel
interfaces.signature: @Observable @MainActor final class CaptureViewModel { private(set) var state: CaptureState; func photoCaptured(data: Data) async; func selectCategory(_ category: Category); func save(title: String, subtype: String) async; func resumeDraft(itemID: UUID) async }
interfaces.notes: Sole owner of capture state machine and draft mutation; nothing else writes to a draft Item.

interfaces.name: CatalogViewModel
interfaces.signature: @Observable @MainActor final class CatalogViewModel { private(set) var activeItems: [Item]; private(set) var lockedCount: Int; private(set) var loadState: LoadState; func load() async; func softDelete(_ itemID: UUID) async; func undoDelete(_ itemID: UUID) async }
interfaces.notes: Renders ItemDisplayState per item via computeDisplayState; never its own ad hoc locked/incomplete checks.

interfaces.name: LoadState
interfaces.signature: enum LoadState: Equatable, Sendable { case loading; case loaded; case empty; case error(String) }
interfaces.notes: Shared four-state enum reused across Catalog, Export Preview, Preserved list, Recently Deleted.

interfaces.name: ItemDetailViewModel
interfaces.signature: @Observable @MainActor final class ItemDetailViewModel { private(set) var item: Item; private(set) var displayState: ItemDisplayState; func addConditionEntry(note: String, provenanceNote: String?, photoData: Data?, conditionChange: ConditionGrade?) async; func addValueEntry(amount: Decimal, type: ValueType, sourceNote: String?, date: Date, photoData: Data?) async; func savePurchaseFacts(_ facts: PurchaseFacts?) async }
interfaces.notes: Owns three-module state; Value module renders LockedTeaserCard vs live ledger vs read-only-preserved based on displayState + subscription.

interfaces.name: ExportPreviewViewModel
interfaces.signature: @Observable @MainActor final class ExportPreviewViewModel { private(set) var pages: [ExportPagePreview]; private(set) var loadState: LoadState; func generate(mode: ExportMode) async; func share() -> URL? }
interfaces.notes: Backed by ExportService.generatePreviewPages; TabView(.page) page-position accessibility sourced directly from ExportPagePreview fields, never PDFView.

interfaces.name: PaywallViewModel
interfaces.signature: @Observable @MainActor final class PaywallViewModel { private(set) var products: [Product]; private(set) var loadState: LoadState; func purchase(_ product: Product) async; func restore() async }
interfaces.notes: Reads/writes only through EntitlementProvider; never touches ItemRepository directly.

interfaces.name: PrivacyOverlay
interfaces.signature: struct PrivacyOverlayModifier: ViewModifier { func body(content: Content) -> some View }
interfaces.notes: Root-level modifier applied once in App/, driven by scenePhase; covers app-switcher snapshot, not per-screen.

interfaces.name: CollectionSummaryProvider
interfaces.signature: actor CollectionSummaryProvider { func current() async -> CollectionSummary; func invalidate() async }
interfaces.notes: Debounced recompute on repository write events; sole source for widget and aggregate displays.

interfaces.name: WidgetReloadCoordinator
interfaces.signature: actor WidgetReloadCoordinator { func scheduleReload() async }
interfaces.notes: Coalesces WidgetKit reloads to respect background budget.

interfaces.name: RecoveryPurgeScheduler
interfaces.signature: struct RecoveryPurgeScheduler { func purgeEligibleItems(repository: any ItemRepository, now: Date) async throws }
interfaces.notes: Runs at launch/foreground only; no background task scheduler (no BGTaskScheduler).

interfaces.name: ExportDocumentModel
interfaces.signature: struct ExportDocumentModel: Sendable { let sections: [ExportSection]; let generatedAt: Date }
interfaces.notes: The export-formatting boundary: domain models + AppSettings map into this exactly once; renderer and in-app preview both consume it so they can never disagree on dates/values.

interfaces.name: ExportSection
interfaces.signature: struct ExportSection: Sendable { let title: String; let formattedEntries: [String]; let photoRefs: [PhotoAssetRef] }
interfaces.notes: Plain rendering unit consumed by ExportService; never built ad hoc inline inside the renderer.

interfaces.name: PrivacyOverlayModifier
interfaces.signature: struct PrivacyOverlayModifier: ViewModifier { func body(content: Content) -> some View }
interfaces.notes: Root-level privacy shield for app-switcher snapshots and background transitions.

interfaces.name: CachedEntitlement
interfaces.signature: struct CachedEntitlement: Codable, Equatable, Sendable { let isSubscribed: Bool; let expiresAt: Date?; let verifiedAt: Date }
interfaces.notes: RESOLVED this round: flat snapshot replaces a rejected recursive EntitlementState.unknownOffline(lastKnown: EntitlementState?) design. Codex's fix, adopted since nobody defended the recursive shape.

interfaces.name: isSubscriptionActive
interfaces.signature: func isSubscriptionActive(_ state: EntitlementState) -> Bool
interfaces.notes: The ONLY legal conversion from EntitlementState to the plain Bool that computeDisplayState/partitionActiveAndLocked/collectionSummary expect. No lane may inline its own switch over EntitlementState.
